query:
-- Check existing flight schedules
SELECT id, flightNo, airline, departureAirport, arrivalAirport, direction FROM flight_schedules;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user ZhmXq2fuwbq2e6E.b3f96895581d --database 9L2UFkGMTFNGvGrFPN8jYv --execute -- Check existing flight schedules
SELECT id, flightNo, airline, departureAirport, arrivalAirport, direction FROM flight_schedules;
